content.text:
```mdl
@ Contract: Confidentiality (Non‑Disclosure) Agreement
@ Document ID: contract_nli_no_align_dev_12_nda_20
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_12_nda_20

open std.collections   # for List<T>

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Parties to the agreement
type Party =
    | BROOKS(unit)
    | CLIENT(unit)

@ Categories of confidential information (as described in §1)
type ConfidentialCategory =
    | Personal(unit)
    | Financial(unit)
    | Product(unit)
    | Formulation(unit)
    | ProcessingProcedure(unit)

@ A single piece of confidential information
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    category: ConfidentialCategory,      # e.g. Formulation
    content: string,                     # free‑text description
    is_exception: bool,                  # true when an exception in §3 applies
    is_retained: bool                    # true when the receiving party keeps it after return
}

@ Reasons that make information an exception to confidentiality (§3)
type ExceptionReason =
    | AlreadyPossesses(unit)
    | IndependentlyDeveloped(unit)
    | ReceivedFromThirdParty(unit)
    | InadvertentlyDisclosed(unit)
    | ConsentGiven(unit)
    | ServicePerformance(unit)

@ Information about a legally compelled disclosure (§4)
type CompelledDisclosure = {
    legal_request: string,   # description of subpoena, court order, etc.
    notified_client: bool    # true when BROOKS has notified CLIENT in writing
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities (public model objects)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The two parties to the agreement
entity disclosing_party: Party
entity receiving_party: Party

@ All confidential information that may be exchanged
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInfo

@ A record of a compelled disclosure, if any
entity compelled_disclosure: CompelledDisclosure

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper Functions
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Determines whether a piece of information falls under an exception
func is_exception(info: ConfidentialInfo) -> bool:
    info.is_exception

@ Determines whether a piece of information is a formulation or processing procedure
func is_proprietary(info: ConfidentialInfo) -> bool:
    case info.category:
        | ConfidentialCategory.Formulation(): true
        | ConfidentialCategory.ProcessingProcedure(): true
        | _: false

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – normative requirements (deontic modalities)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1.2 – Receiving party must keep all confidential information in confidence
rule F disclose_confidential_info:
    not is_exception(confidential_info) always

@ Clause 1.2 – Obligation to keep information confidential (positive formulation)
rule O keep_confidential_info:
    not is_exception(confidential_info) always

@ Clause 2.2 – Breach causes irreparable harm; injunctive relief is permitted
rule O injunctive_relief_allowed:
    true always   # placeholder – the existence of this rule marks the legal consequence

@ Clause 3 – Exceptions (permission to disclose)
rule P disclose_under_exception:
    is_exception(confidential_info) always

@ Clause 4 – Compelled disclosure notification
rule O notify_client_of_compelled_disclosure:
    compelled_disclosure.notified_client always

@ Clause 4 – Use best efforts to obtain protective order (at CLIENT’s expense)
rule O best_efforts_for_protective_order:
    true always   # placeholder – the requirement is captured by the modality

@ Clause 5 – Return of material upon termination or written request
rule O return_confidential_material:
    not is_exception(confidential_info) always

@ Clause 5 – Retention period when no return request is made (3 years)
rule O retain_for_three_years_if_no_request:
    not is_exception(confidential_info) always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Hypothesis (not a contractual requirement, but a scenario to test)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Hypothesis: Receiving party may retain some Confidential Information after return or destruction
rule P retain_after_return_hypothesis:
    confidential_info.is_retained eventually
```
